data.title: 国际服ANIME EXPO 2024参展特别奖励
data.summary: [ANIME EXPO 2024 Participation Celebration Special Gift] Thank you for your support during the event
data.body:
[ANIME EXPO 2024 Participation Celebration Special Gift]

Thank you for your support during the event, Sensei!
We sent a special gift to your mailbox as thanks! Be sure to check it out!

🗓️Event Period: 7/8 (Mon) 1:00 AM – 7/15 (Mon) 2:59 PM (UTC)
